compactPrompt: When compacting this development session, you MUST preserve verbatim: the §1 active-target and backlog tasks in dreams.md, the architecture rules and conventions from CLAUDE.md and .claude/rules/, the explicit file paths modified during this branch, and the precise error signatures currently under evaluation. Discard historical conversational prose, greeting filler, and resolved styling discussions.

hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' | grep -qE 'npm( +run)? +(test|build)' && printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"CRITICAL: Update README.md/CLAUDE.md/FEATURES.md if features or architecture shifted."}}' || true
